shared_properties: 120x180 frame size and academy coat silhouette.
Navy robe body, gold trim, and skin tone distribution.
Rightward facing combat root position on the platform.
differences: Shoulders drop by about 12 px and the guard arm opens too late.
Cyan rune glow turns off after frame 2.
Card hand trails behind the body to show missed timing.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the fail state and return control to idle after the four-frame sequence ends.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_student_reflect_fail_4f_10fps.png through AssetServer and register the atlas under player_student_reflect_fail_4f_10fps.
runtime_notes: Fail state lines up with the idle pivot so hit reactions do not slide off the platform.
Damage UI can trigger on the final frame without covering the face.
The non-looping sequence should finish in 0.4 seconds at 10 fps.

context.usage: Shown after a miss window or no card use when the incoming spell connects with the player.

shape.silhouette: Compressed player silhouette with late arm motion and a backward torso lean.

appendages.accessories: Dimmed focus bracer, crest brooch, and sash.

specs.texture: Coat folds bunch at the shoulders and the bracer glow fades out through the sequence.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with a brief red hit accent near the chest in the final frame.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 480x180 px with four 120x180 frames.
Late guard motion remains readable without crossing the card hand silhouette.
Red hit accent appears only in the final frame and covers less than 12 percent of opaque pixels.
